children.text: Step 1:
The interested applicant should visit the
official website
during the application submission period.
Step 2:
Choose the respective Scheme from the list then
In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).
Step 3:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the below mentioned address.
Step 4:
Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted.
Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department
Commissioner, Youth Services and Cultural Activities, Gujarat State, Block: 11, Third Floor, Dr. Jivraj Mehta Bhavan, Sector-10,
Gandhinagar, 382010.
Mail: commi-synca[at]gujarat[dot]gov[dot]in
Website: http://sycd.gujarat.gov.in

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The interested applicant should visit the [official website](https://gujaratsahityaacademy.com/user/yojana/yojana_list) during the application submission period. **Step 2:** Choose the respective Scheme from the list then**** In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required). **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the below mentioned address. **Step 4:** Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted. > **Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department** > **Commissioner, Youth Services and Cultural Activities, Gujarat State, Block: 11, Third Floor, Dr. Jivraj Mehta Bhavan, Sector-10,** > **Gandhinagar, 382010.** > **Mobile: 079-23254095, 079-23252995** > **Mail: commi-synca[at]gujarat[dot]gov[dot]in** > **Website: http://sycd.gujarat.gov.in**

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Financial Assistance for Preparation of Training Camp and Participation in Land, Mountain & Sea Adventure Sports Competitions" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote adventure sports among the youth of Gujarat by encouraging their participation in training programs, workshops, expeditions, and competitions organized within and outside the state. The scheme offers financial support to cover expenses such as fees, equipment, insurance, transportation, and other relevant costs.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Financial Assistance:** Up to ₹30,000/- or 75% of the actual expenditure (whichever is lower).
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote youth participation in adventure sports by providing financial assistance for training, workshops, and competitions.

children.text: The scheme "Financial Assistance for Preparation of Training Camp and Participation in Land, Mountain & Sea Adventure Sports Competitions" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote adventure sports among the youth of Gujarat by encouraging their participation in training programs, workshops, expeditions, and competitions organized within and outside the state. The scheme offers financial support to cover expenses such as fees, equipment, insurance, transportation, and other relevant costs.
Financial Assistance:
Up to ₹30,000/- or 75% of the actual expenditure (whichever is lower).

basicDetails.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Preparation of Training Camp and Participation in Land, Mountain & Sea Adventure Sports Competitions

nodalDepartmentName.label: Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat. 1. The applicant should be up to 45 years of age at the time of application. 1. The applicant should have participated in or completed a training program, workshop, expedition, or competition related to land, sea, or air adventure sports.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant should be up to 45 years of age at the time of application.
The applicant should have participated in or completed a training program, workshop, expedition, or competition related to land, sea, or air adventure sports.
